base_size.note: Varies by effect type - particles are 2-4px, speech bubble is 12x10px

shared_attributes.layer: foreground (on top of all other elements)

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Visual feedback particle that appears when player pets Echo, indicating affection
context.screen_position: Spawns above Echo's head at x=64px, y=30-40px, then rises upward to y=10-20px
adjacent_elements: echo_happy (this particle spawns during happy state animation)
context.usage_scenario: 3 heart particles spawn sequentially during echo_happy animation (at frames 2, 4, 6). Each heart rises upward 20-30px over 1 second while fading out. Communicates positive emotional response to petting.

visual_specification.shape: Classic heart icon shape. 4x4px pixel heart with two rounded lobes at top and point at bottom.

animation.description: Frame 1: Heart appears at full opacity at spawn position. Frame 2: Heart moves up 8px. Frame 3: Heart moves up another 8px, begins fade (75% opacity). Frame 4: Heart moves up final 8px, fades to 25% opacity then disappears. Total vertical movement: 24px upward. Total duration: 1 second.

visual_specification.details: Heart shape: 4x4px in #FF004D. Pixel pattern: Row 1: ■□■ (2 pixels), Row 2: ■■■■ (4 pixels), Row 3: □■■□ (2 pixels center), Row 4: □□■□ (1 pixel center point). Spawns at x=64±5px (slight random offset), y=35px. Rises to y=10px. 3 hearts spawn per happy animation with 0.5 second intervals.

relationships.shared_with: Same pink color (#FF004D) as Echo's cheek patches
relationships.differences_from: Unlike music notes: heart shape (not note), spawns during petting (not singing). Unlike other particles: larger size (4x4 vs 2-3px), pink color, upward movement.
